metadata.title: Generate a sales offer prompt for an audit agent targeting law firm operators in the European Union, using a technical lens to ensure compliance with EU regulatory standards and internal governance.

mission.primary_objective: Generate a sales offer prompt for an audit agent targeting law firm operators in the European Union, using a technical lens to ensure compliance with EU regulatory standards and internal governance.
mission.success_definition: The prompt is valid SR8 JSON with all required fields.; Artifact type is correctly set to sales_offer_prompt.; Depth tier is D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE.; Runtime target is Codex.; Validation gates are documented and enforceable.; The prompt can be directly used by an audit agent to generate a compliant sales offer.

in_scope.item: The prompt must be structured for SR8 compilation, include explicit validation gates, and address artifact type ambiguity by clearly defining the output as a sales_offer_prompt. It must incorporate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria as chaotic input, then resolve them into a governed artifact.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: The prompt is valid SR8 JSON with all required fields.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Artifact type is correctly set to sales_offer_prompt.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Validation gates are documented and enforceable.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 6
gate.pass_condition: The prompt can be directly used by an audit agent to generate a compliant sales offer.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.offer_goal: Generate a sales offer prompt for an audit agent targeting law firm operators in the European Union, using a technical lens to ensure compliance with EU regulatory standards and internal governance.

pain_points.item: The prompt must be structured for SR8 compilation, include explicit validation gates, and address artifact type ambiguity by clearly defining the output as a sales_offer_prompt. It must incorporate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria as chaotic input, then resolve them into a governed artifact.

SRXML_Artifact.value_proposition: The prompt must be structured for SR8 compilation, include explicit validation gates, and address artifact type ambiguity by clearly defining the output as a sales_offer_prompt. It must incorporate missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria as chaotic input, then resolve them into a governed artifact.

proof_policy.item: Must comply with EU data protection and legal audit regulations (e.g., GDPR, ePrivacy Directive).
Output must be a single JSON object with no markdown fences.
All sections (Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract) must be present and SR8-compilable.
Validation gates must be explicit, e.g., schema checks, compliance checks, and acceptance criteria verification.
Urgent language must be used to convey time sensitivity without compromising accuracy.

conversion_path.item: required_fields: artifact_type; depth_tier; runtime_target; should_block; blocked_reason; compiled_intent
compiled_intent_structure: Objective: string; Scope: string; Constraints: array of strings; Success Criteria: array of strings; Output Contract: object with format and required_fields

validation_gates: Schema validation: ensure all required fields present and types correct.; Compliance validation: verify EU regulatory alignment.; Acceptance criteria validation: confirm all success criteria are met.; Artifact type validation: ensure artifact_type is sales_offer_prompt.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
